channel.title: Grafana Snapshots on Home Smart Mesh
channel.description: Recent content in Grafana Snapshots on Home Smart Mesh

item.title: Light rooms
item.description: Room light east and west # Full screen Open in a new page var button = document.getElementById("btn-bc6c51b9555f0ff6"); button.onclick = ()={ var elem = document.getElementById("ifm-bc6c51b9555f0ff6"); if (elem.requestFullscreen) { elem.requestFullscreen(); } else if (elem.webkitRequestFullscreen) { elem.webkitRequestFullscreen(); } else if (elem.msRequestFullscreen) { elem.msRequestFullscreen(); } };

item.title: Temperature
item.description: Hot summer # Full screen Open in a new page var button = document.getElementById("btn-388b84c89c2369b2"); button.onclick = ()={ var elem = document.getElementById("ifm-388b84c89c2369b2"); if (elem.requestFullscreen) { elem.requestFullscreen(); } else if (elem.webkitRequestFullscreen) { elem.webkitRequestFullscreen(); } else if (elem.msRequestFullscreen) { elem.msRequestFullscreen(); } }; Xiaomi Aqara vs DIY BME280 # Full screen Open in a new page var button = document.getElementById("btn-f8d70b01c18b3285"); button.onclick = ()={ var elem = document.

item.title: SensorTags 90 Days
item.description: Voltage and Temperature # SensorTag stress test with report every 3 seconds with average over 1 hour Full screen Open in a new page var button = document.getElementById("btn-7df75999c5c036f9"); button.onclick = ()={ var elem = document.getElementById("ifm-7df75999c5c036f9"); if (elem.requestFullscreen) { elem.requestFullscreen(); } else if (elem.webkitRequestFullscreen) { elem.webkitRequestFullscreen(); } else if (elem.msRequestFullscreen) { elem.msRequestFullscreen(); } };

item.title: SensorTags 2 Days
item.description: Voltage and Temperature # SensorTag stress test with report every 3 seconds Full screen Open in a new page var button = document.getElementById("btn-98f35d7bf7cdff04"); button.onclick = ()={ var elem = document.getElementById("ifm-98f35d7bf7cdff04"); if (elem.requestFullscreen) { elem.requestFullscreen(); } else if (elem.webkitRequestFullscreen) { elem.webkitRequestFullscreen(); } else if (elem.msRequestFullscreen) { elem.msRequestFullscreen(); } };
